info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: YouTube
tags.description: Scrape YouTube channels, videos, and more

get.description: Get the shorts from a channel. If you need more details about the short like description, publish date, etc, you'll need to use the 'Video/Short Details' endpoint.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more videos. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

shorts.title: My app failed, then I changed one thing, and made $80K
shorts.description: Praneeth quit his $250K/year job to build an app that failed. Then, he changed one thing and made $80K
